---
title: "Scenarios"
sidebar: scenarios
---

The proposal is organized around practical archive and analysis workflows.

## Working Archive Flow

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  Files[Raw or processed DAS files] --> Patch[Patch]
  Notes[Field notes, maps, tap tests] --> Inv[Sidecar Inventory]
  Patch --> Resolve[data_source_id lookup]
  Inv --> Resolve
  Resolve --> Enriched[Enriched patch when requested]
```

The inventory can live beside field data as YAML or JSON. It can start incomplete, then gain better geometry, coupling, acquisition, or revision history as information arrives.

## Scenario Pages

- [Sidecar Inventory](sidecar.qmd): write a small inventory beside data files.
- [Patch Enrichment](enrichment.qmd): resolve inventory context only when needed.
- [Geometry And Coupling](geometry-coupling.qmd): project physical path metadata onto patch coordinates.
- [Revisions Over Time](revisions.qmd): keep corrected metadata without losing history.
